rules.description: Map Left Command alone to Alt+Spacebar
Caps Lock to Esc and Ctrl
Wrap selected text in \replaced{}{} using Cmd+Shift+R
Wrap selected text in \added{} using Cmd+Shift+A
Wrap selected text in \deleted{} using Cmd+Shift+D
command-f1 and f2 to adjust keyboard brightness
Use Fn+Delete as Move to Trash
Mac OSX: disable cmd + h to prevent minimising an application window
Mac OSX: disable cmd + option + h + m to prevent minimising all windows
Mac OSX: Use Function Keys in Supported Apps, else use Media Keys
(Remote Desktop) Left control to left command
(Remote Desktop) Left command to left control
